Carentan.title: Chicken house scaffold climb
Carentan.description: Either climb from the rubble pile or use the scaffold at the back of the chicken house when pushed back.

Omaha.title: B10 east — Deathclimb
Omaha.description: Bush climb on the east side of B10. Use the foliage to get up the bluff without exposing yourself on the beach.

SMDMV2.title: SMDM hedgerow bush climb
SMDMV2.description: Use the dense bushes along the hedgerow to climb over without being seen from the road.
